zh.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven於1179年6月10日出生在荷蘭-拉藍德分。她於1200年與Floris Herbaren van der Lede結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年3月11日在荷蘭-拉藍德波甘巴賀特享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven于1179年6月10日出生在荷兰-拉藍德分。她于1200年与Floris Herbaren van der Lede结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年3月11日在荷兰-拉藍德波甘巴賀特享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Schoonhoven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Andries, Cornelis, Pieter, Teunis, Wim.

Dutch (also Van Schoonhoven): habitational name for someone from Schoonhoven in South Holland or perhaps another place of the same name in Kampenhout in Brabant province, Belgium. The surname Schoonhoven is also found in Germany.
History: This surname is recorded in Beverwyck in New Netherland (now Albany, NY) in the mid 17th century. Geurt Hendrickse van Schoonhoven was a carpenter who came to New Netherland c. 1650.

nameMeanings.name: Huges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven was born on 10 June 1179, in Schoonhoven, South Holland, Netherlands. She married Floris Herbaren van der Lede in 1200. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 March 1246, in Bergambacht, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven est née le 10 juin 1179, à Schoonhoven, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Elle a épousé Floris Herbaren van der Lede en 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1246, à Bergambacht, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven wurde am 10. Juni 1179 in Schoonhoven, Südholland, Niederlande geboren. Sie hat 1200 Floris Herbaren van der Lede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. März 1246 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Bergambacht, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven è nata il il 10 giugno 1179 nel Schoonhoven, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Lei sposato Floris Herbaren van der Lede nel 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1246, nel Bergambacht, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven(은)는 1179년 6월 10일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 슈호븐에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1200년 Floris Herbaren van der Lede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 3월 11일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 버갬바트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1246, em Bergambacht, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven родилась 10 июня 1179 г. в местности щуновен, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Floris Herbaren van der Lede в 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 марта 1246 г. в местности биргамбачт, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Asekijn Huges Bottersdr van Schoonhoven nació el 10 de junio de 1179, en Schoonhoven, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Se casó con Floris Herbaren van der Lede en 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1246, en Bergambacht, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 66 años.
